safeClaims: GCA is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token on Base Mainnet.
GCA is concept-stage and is building public identity, safer support intake, and planned non-custodial quant research access.
The public member page currently creates local packets and does not create a live account.
The planned GCA Member benefit requires 1,000,000 GCA held for 30 consecutive days before one-time 10,000 GCA review.
The official market route is GCA/USDT on Base Mainnet.
Owner reported on 2026-05-14 that no wallet risk warning was visible in the tested wallet/DEX flow.
doNotClaim: public self-service member or 10,000 GCA member benefit claiming is live before controlled HTTPS UI and holding-period review are connected
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval, permanent warning-free status, or cross-wallet warning removal before vendor/current wallet UI confirms it
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
deep liquidity, price support, or trading outcomes
